subject: (no subject)
body:
The guy I fly with in SD was in a fatal chopper crash today..2 dead and he, the pilot is currently having his leg amputated. Pilot error - he was piloting a film crew filming a boat race and the chopper skid hit the boat..

G

PS My e mail has changed to gmax1@ellmax.com - plse make a note
